untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) range boundary identification with horizontal support/resistance levels, (2) tracking of equal highs/lows formation, (3) breakout attempt detection with follow-through analysis, and (4) failed breakout pattern recognition. These require multi-bar pattern analysis and statistical comparison not available in single-bar indicators. Donchian channels provide range boundaries but cannot detect failed breakout attempts or follow-through validation.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as range boundaries and entry/exit on range reversion, but this misses the core signal requirement of detecting failed breakouts with insufficient follow-through. The signal is fundamentally pattern-based and requires candlestick analysis logic not expressible in the allowed indicator set.
